assertions.description: No identification of the dual-conversion architecture (two mixer stages for wideband coverage)
No PLL loop filter detection for RFFC5072 charge pump outputs (R59/C90/C91/C87 form loop filter)
AFE IC (U11) and its SPI control bus not identified as part of the RF signal chain
Baseband IQ signal paths (TXBB.I+/-, TXBB.Q+/-, RXBB.I+/-, RXBB.Q+/-) not traced as differential pairs or signal chains
REVIEW: LMV358 opamp circuits classified as comparator_or_open_loop but these form active filters in the baseband signal conditioning path
REVIEW: RF chain amplifiers list is empty despite the radio module containing gain stages in the signal path
REVIEW: RF chain filters list is empty despite multiple LC filter networks being detected separately in lc_filters
REVIEW: RX_RCVR.SDA/SCL pullup rail shown as 3V3TX but radio.kicad_sch context suggests these should be on the RX power domain
REVIEW: 16 single-pin nets reported includes hierarchical connections (AFE_SPI.CS, TX_XCVR.SHDN, etc.) that are connected in the parent sheet - not real issues
